content:
And then literally call me for, like, two weeks to come back to work.

It was nice to feel wanted, but I was like, I already found out of a job, sorry.

And I go to work Monday through Friday, 9 a.m. To 4 p.m., and I really love that.

You., if someone respects you, they'll do what you ask, like, without having to even..

No, and it's like, listen, if you're honest with somebody, like, I went in and I told,L, I'm recently divorced.

You know, I'm recently divorced, I have three young kids, you know, there's things I have to, you know, there's three things I'm like you know, I have to be there.

I have to be there when they get home from school.

I have to meet up for dinner, or you know, I have to be there for bedtime.

Like, I can't not be there for any of those things.

So you're on attachment to this house and juice.

So you, I take it over?

Do I hit them?
